channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] UKRAINIAN → RUSSIAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Crimea, Krym, Avtonomna Respublika, Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: UKRAINIAN / RUSSIAN. Location: Crimea, Krym, Avtonomna Respublika, Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → LEBANESE : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / LEBANESE. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] WASHINGTON → ISRAELI : Fight with small arms and light weapons (Washington, District of Columbia, United States)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: WASHINGTON / ISRAELI. Location: Washington, District of Columbia, United States. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → SYRIA : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Syria)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / SYRIA. Location: Syria. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 7 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAELI / PALESTINIAN. Location: Jabalia, Gaza Strip (general), Gaza Strip. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: ISRAEL / PRISON. Location: Ventura County, California, United States. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Engage in popular protest, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / FRENCH. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: PRESIDENT / nan. Location: Isfahan, Esfahan, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.
